---
title: "**Biomedical Open Case Studies: Discovering Temporal Immune Programs with CoGAPS in Single-Cell Dengue Infection Data**"
include-sections:
  stat-los: true
  data-import: true
  data-exploration: true
  data-wrangling: true
  data-viz: true
  data-analysis: true
execute:
  warning: false
---

{{< include _main_image.qmd >}}

{{< include _ocs_frontmatter.qmd >}}

{{< include _cite.qmd >}}

{{< include _motivation.qmd >}}

{{< include _main_question.qmd >}}

{{< include _los.qmd >}}

{{< include _packages.qmd >}}

{{< include _context.qmd >}}

{{< include _data_description.qmd >}}

{{< include _limitations.qmd >}}

{{< include _bioethics.qmd >}}

::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="include-sections.data-import"}

{{< include _data_import.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="include-sections.data-exploration"}

{{< include _data_exploration.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="include-sections.data-wrangling"}

{{< include _data_wrangling.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="include-sections.data-viz"}

{{< include _data_visualization.qmd >}}

:::

::: {.content-hidden unless-meta="include-sections.data-analysis"}

{{< include _data_analysis.qmd >}}

:::

{{< include _summary.qmd >}}

{{< include _suggested_hw.qmd >}}

{{< include _additional_info.qmd >}}

## **Session Info**
***

```{r}
if (requireNamespace("sessioninfo", quietly = TRUE)) {
  sessioninfo::session_info()
} else {
  sessionInfo()
}
```

{{< include _acknowledgements.qmd >}}
